title: Release v0.5.19

sources.reason: Release distribution check fetches installer contents from a raw GitHub URL that currently returns 404.
User requested running the installation compatibility CI after the fix.

riskAssessment.reason: Fixing public release validation and synchronizing the published version touches installer, docs, and release metadata.

executionDecision.reason: Scope and verification are now concrete.

preReviewWarnings: Review the release distribution source change carefully because it alters how public installer contents are fetched.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: make check-release-distribution passes without raw.githubusercontent 404 failures.
release.json, install.sh, docs, examples, and installer tests reference the new published version consistently.
The installation compatibility workflow remains valid after the release update.
The new release tag is created after verification.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.
Prefer stable GitHub-supported fetch paths over raw file URLs in release verification.

intent.problem: The published release check currently fails because it fetches install.sh from a raw.githubusercontent.com URL that returns 404 for the current release tag, blocking release verification and publication.
constraints: Keep the release verification conservative and network-backed.
Preserve compatibility with the existing installation and compatibility CI flow.
Synchronize the published version references consistently when bumping the release.
intent.rationale: Switching release verification to a stable GitHub-supported fetch path removes the raw URL failure mode while keeping the check public and reproducible.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
